description.ko: 빛이 분산되는 순간을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 수정 매질을 통해 기본 색상으로 갈라지는 광학 물리학의 숨겨진 아름다움을 드러냅니다.
description.en: A visual study of the moment light undergoes dispersion, breaking into its fundamental colors through a crystalline medium to reveal the hidden beauty of optical physics.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a precision-cut glass prism refracting a singular beam of pure white light into a brilliant, wide rainbow spectrum. Visible light paths inside the glass, caustic light patterns dancing on a dark matte surface, ethereal atmosphere, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ray-traced lighting, sharp focus on the point of spectral separation.
